title: Row on Lava
description: Includes a new enchantment obtainable from the table/villagers/loot named "Fiery" which when equipped on boots can make players abled to row on lava in the nether making the journey easier.
body:
Includes a new enchantment obtainable from the table/villagers/loot named "Fiery" which when equipped on boots can make players abled to row on lava in the nether making the journey easier.

# How Exactly does it work?

- Apply the enchantment from the enchanting table, loots or villager trade.
- The enchantment allows you to make the boat float on lava and giving you fire-resistance for the time being.
- The boat can't be destrotyed by punching, any boats which are beyond 20 blocks of any player will automatically be destroyed.

# Addons
- Added an enchantment named rowonlava:fiery which can be put on any boots (except chainmail) using an anvil, or from an enchanting table
